## What this changes

<!-- One or two sentences. What constant, helper, or doc does this touch? -->

## Why

<!-- The reason for the change. Link any related issue: Closes #__ -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (corrects an existing value or helper)
- [ ] New / extended constant (additive)
- [ ] Breaking change (changes an exported shape — discussed in an issue first)
- [ ] Docs only

## Checklist

- [ ] I opened an issue first if this changes the shape of an exported value
- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `npm run build` passes
- [ ] `npm test` passes, and I added/updated a test for this change
- [ ] If this is a breaking change, I noted the version-bump impact above
